title: 7-Piece Glass Bowls Set - Decorative Footed Dishes for Fruit, Salad, Trifle, Dessert, Sundae, Appetizer, Prawn Cocktail, Pudding
features: Unique embossed crystal effect glass bowls set made from thick glass for you to serve a variety of foods ranging from starter to desserts. This 7 piece glass bowls set consists of 1 large footed glass bowl and 6 matching small footed glass bowls. Made from clear glass with a smooth finish makes this set ideal for serving appetisers, nibbles, starters, fruits salads, desserts & many other foods.

This 7 Piece Glass Bowls set consists of – 1 x Large Footed Glass Bowls & 6 x Small Footed Glass Bowls. Dimensions of each bowl are - Large Bowl: Height: 9cm & Diameter: 17.5cm / Small Bowls: Height: 6cm & Diameter: 9.8cm.

EVERLASTING GLASS STRUCTURE - High quality glass bowls set made from thick glass with a made to last polished finish is what makes this set extremely durable. The smooth high resistant surface will ensure the bowls remain a crisp clear condition and stay resistant from chips, cracks & scratches. The glass is also non porous, hence they are 100% hygienic and no form of bacteria or flavour will remain on the surface no matter how much they are used.

SERVE INDIVIDUAL PORTIONS AND EXTRA! - Make sure your guests can enjoy and help themselves to seconds with this glass bowls set. No matter if you want to serve a range of nibbles or starters and dessert; this set is designed to be versatile. Give everyone individual portions of the tasty food you have made but also place extra at the centre of the table with the large glass bowl so guests can help themselves to more. This set can also be used to range of nibbles i.e. nachos, dry fruits & more.

GIVE YOUR TABLE A UNIQUE PRESENTATION - Uniquely styled crystal effect glass bowls set ideal for presenting a range of foods. Matching embossed large bowl and 6 small bowls will give the perfect modern presentation when delivering food with this set. It will add an exciting touch and is ideal for everyday or special occasions use i.e. Parties, dinners, events & festive occasions.
description: Deli Glassware 7 Piece Glass Bowls Set Decorative Glass Fruit Salad Bowls Dessert Bowls Sundae Ice Cream Crystal Look Footed Dishes Glass Appetiser Starter Prawn Cocktail Pudding Bowls.
